summary: Iteration 46 - Bug fix verification for branches, reports search button, customer menu flow, and logo display. Fixed customer menu API to hide default branches. All tests passed.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/branches - hides default branches (الفرع الرئيسي, Main Branch) - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/customer/menu/{tenant_id} - hides default branches - PASSED (FIXED)
Backend: GET /api/reports/sales - returns report data - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/tables - returns tables list - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/tables - creates new table for Aljadreia branch - PASSED
Frontend: Reports page has search button (بحث) with data-testid='search-btn' - PASSED
Frontend: Reports page has date filters and branch selector - PASSED
Frontend: Customer menu /menu/{tenant_id} shows branch selection first - PASSED
Frontend: Customer menu shows only real branches (Aljadreia, Alsaydaia) - PASSED
Frontend: Logo displays first letter of restaurant name when no logo set - PASSED
Frontend: Tables page shows real branches, hides default branches - PASSED
Frontend: Add table button visible and functional - PASSED

bug_fixes_verified.fix_description: Added $nin filter to hide default branch names in both /api/branches and /api/customer/menu/{tenant_id} endpoints
Added search button with data-testid='search-btn' that triggers fetchReports()

bug_fixes_verified.issue: تطبيق الزبائن يذهب للقائمة مباشرة بدلاً من اختيار الفروع
bug_fixes_verified.fix_description: Customer menu now shows branch selection first when multiple branches exist
Logo displays first letter of restaurant name if no logo URL is set

code_changes_made.change: Added default branch filtering to /api/customer/menu/{tenant_id} endpoint
code_changes_made.reason: Customer menu was returning default branches which should be hidden

critical_code_review_comments: Customer menu API now correctly filters out default branches using $nin operator
Reports page search button properly triggers data refresh
Logo fallback to first letter works correctly when no logo URL is set
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed customer menu API to hide default branches
seed_data_creation: Created test table #388 for Aljadreia branch during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 46 verified all bug fixes: 1) Branches API and Customer Menu API now hide default branches (الفرع الرئيسي, Main Branch, etc.) using $nin filter. 2) Reports page has search button with data-testid='search-btn'. 3) Customer menu shows branch selection first when multiple branches exist. 4) Logo displays first letter of restaurant name when no logo is set. Reports are empty because no orders exist in database - this is expected behavior, not a bug.
notes: التقارير فارغة لأنه لا توجد طلبات في قاعدة البيانات - هذا ليس خطأ برمجي
